form.formComment: Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start 6th of 10 at Sanliurfa on March 11 over 2100m, 32 len behind Hilvanlioglu with 56.5kg at $12.35. Before that 5th of 14 at Sanliurfa in G3 on March 4 over 2000m, 15 len behind Kent Ruzgari with 59kg at $47.20. Can turn things around.
